torch_pattern: input_nchw = input_tensor.permute(0, 3, 1, 2); output_nchw = torch.nn.functional.grid_sample(input_nchw.float(), grid.reshape(N, H_grid, W_grid * K, 2).float(), mode=mode, padding_mode=padding_mode, align_corners=align_corners); output = output_nchw.permute(0, 2, 3, 1).to(input_tensor.dtype)

weight_transform.input_transform: permute NCHW -> NHWC: input.permute(0, 2, 3, 1); keep ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT
weight_transform.grid_transform: grid (N, H_out, W_out, 2) optionally packed along last dim with K coordinate sets -> (N, H_out, W_out/K, 2*K); ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT; dtype float32 or bfloat16 (bfloat16 grid has looser tolerance: atol~1.0)
weight_transform.output_transform: output is NHWC; permute(0, 3, 1, 2) to recover NCHW for downstream torch-equivalent ops

placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(torch_input_nhwc, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device) — default interleaved DRAM
unit test: ttnn.from_torch(torch_grid, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, dtype=grid_dtype) — float32 or bfloat16, default interleaved DRAM
